title: Vanilla 2.0
description: This modpack is Vanilla+ with a ton of preformance mods and new graphics. The point of this modpack is to get the best vanilla modpack possible without any new big content mods.
body: A vanilla+ ish modpack with 100 mods! This modpack priorities looks and details and it completlly revamps all dimentions and biomes. The modpack contains built in shaders, free multiplayer with essensial, and proximity voice chat.
